evals.prompt: Build a responsive card grid that shows 1 column on mobile, 2 on tablet, and 3 on desktop
evals.expected_output: Agent provides a grid layout using grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 with gap utilities
expectations: Uses CSS Grid with grid-cols-* utilities
Uses md: and lg: responsive prefixes

evals.prompt: How do I use container queries in Tailwind CSS 4? I want a card component that adapts based on its container width.
evals.expected_output: Agent provides @container wrapper with @sm: and @md: responsive prefixes on child elements
expectations: Uses @sm: and @md: prefixes (not sm: and md:)
Explains difference between viewport (sm:) and container (@sm:) queries
Shows a practical card component example

evals.prompt: Create a sidebar layout where the sidebar is fixed width and the main content fills the rest
evals.expected_output: Agent provides flex layout with flex-shrink-0 sidebar and flex-1 main content area
expectations: Sidebar uses fixed width (w-64 or similar) with flex-shrink-0
Main content uses flex-1 to fill remaining space
